description:
EIM GUI: Cross-Platform ESP-IDF Installation Manager


What's Changed
- EIM-849: updating github actions to new versions to avoind using Node.js v20 by @Hahihula in #864
- EIM-815: change the output for the logs from stdout to stderr by @Hahihula in #870
- EIM-853: fix decoupling of the IDF_VERSION and ESP_IDF_VERSION which were by mistake set to the same value by @Hahihula in #871
- EIM-857 add deactivation script creation by @Hahihula in #874
- EIM-858: updated docs FAQ with info about systemwide proxy by @Hahihula in #877
- EIM-761: updated documentation FAQ section with information about small /tmp partition by @Hahihula in #879
- Eim-432 add list tools command by @Hahihula in #876
- EIM-864: fix rpm package release metadata by @Hahihula in #884
- fix the /usr/bin shadowinf /usr/local/bin etc. by @Hahihula in #883
Full Changelog: v0.13.1...v0.14.0
